creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-05 10:09:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/optar       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    graphics/optar/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Optar stands for OPTical ARchiver.
  It's a codec for encoding data on paper, then you print it with a laser printer.
  If you want to read the recording, scan it with a scanner and feed into the
  decoder program.
  
  WWW: http://ronja.twibright.com/optar/
  
  PR:             ports/127796
  Submitted by:   antonakis at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1188    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/graphics/optar/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/optar/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/graphics/optar/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/optar/pkg-descr (new)
